summary.en: Premium coworking and managed private office spaces for startups, freelancers, and SMEs across India.
summary.zh: 為印度各地新創、自由工作者與中小企業提供高端共享辦公與託管私人辦公空間。

highlight.en: Innov8 became one of India's best-known YC-backed workspace brands before being acquired by hospitality giant OYO. OYO bought it in 2019 in an all-cash deal worth about INR 220 crore (~$32M).
highlight.zh: Innov8 在被飯店巨頭 OYO 收購前,是印度最知名的 YC 系共享辦公品牌之一。OYO 於 2019 年以約 2.2 億盧比(約 3,200 萬美元)全現金收購。

funding.en: Acquired by OYO in 2019 for ~INR 220 crore (~$32M) all-cash
funding.zh: 2019 年被 OYO 以約 2.2 億盧比(約 3,200 萬美元)全現金收購

sources.title: OYO Acquires Innov8 For INR 220 Cr In An All Cash Deal
Here's why OYO is betting big on the $36B coworking space

summary.en: Direct-to-consumer furniture brand known for modular, easy-to-assemble sofas that ship within a week.
summary.zh: 主打模組化、易組裝沙發的直接面向消費者(DTC)家具品牌,商品一週內即可出貨。

highlight.en: Burrow turned a dorm-room idea into one of Fast Company's most innovative retail brands, with its sofa named a TIME best invention of 2018. It was acquired by Havenly Brands in October 2024.
highlight.zh: Burrow 將宿舍裡的點子做成《Fast Company》評選最具創新力的零售品牌之一,其沙發更獲《TIME》選為 2018 年最佳發明。2024 年 10 月被 Havenly Brands 收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Havenly Brands in Oct 2024 (terms undisclosed)
funding.zh: 2024 年 10 月被 Havenly Brands 收購(交易條件未公開)

sources.title: Havenly Brands Acquires Burrow
Havenly Brands acquires Burrow as it builds out its portfolio of home brands

summary.en: Mobile and wearable digital-identity wallet for seamless payments, identity, and 'wave to pay' authentication.
summary.zh: 結合行動與穿戴裝置的數位身分錢包,讓支付、身分驗證與「揮手付款」更順暢。

highlight.en: Proxy pioneered a smart-ring digital wallet replacing keys, badges, and passwords with a privacy-first identity signal. Smart-ring maker Oura acquired Proxy in 2023 in an all-equity deal valuing it at about $165M.
highlight.zh: Proxy 開創智慧戒指數位錢包,以重視隱私的身分訊號取代鑰匙、識別證與密碼。智慧戒指業者 Oura 於 2023 年以全股票交易收購,估值約 1.65 億美元。

funding.en: Acquired by Oura in 2023, all-equity deal valuing Proxy ~$165M
funding.zh: 2023 年被 Oura 以全股票交易收購,估值約 1.65 億美元

sources.title: OURA Acquires Proxy in All-Equity Deal
Oura Acquires Proxy to Expand Into Payments and Authentication

summary.en: Unified workforce platform to run HR, IT, and Finance, automating the entire global employee lifecycle.
summary.zh: 一站式員工管理平台,統一執行 HR、IT 與財務,自動化全球員工的整個生命週期。

highlight.en: Founded by Parker Conrad, Rippling is one of YC's most valuable companies and a poster child for the 'compound startup' model. It raised a $450M Series G in May 2025 at a $16.8B valuation, reaching $1.85B raised total.
highlight.zh: 由 Parker Conrad 創辦,Rippling 是 YC 旗下最具價值的公司之一,也是「複合型新創」模式的代表。2025 年 5 月完成 4.5 億美元 G 輪募資,估值達 168 億美元,累計募資 18.5 億美元。

funding.zh: 最新估值約 168 億美元(2025 年 5 月 G 輪);累計募資逾 18.5 億美元

sources.title: Rippling raises $450M at a $16.8B valuation, reveals YC is a customer
Rippling valued at $16.8 billion in $450 million funding round

summary.en: App-based marketplace where healthcare facilities post open shifts and workers claim them to fill staffing gaps.
summary.zh: 以 App 為核心的媒合平台,醫療照護機構張貼空缺班次,工作者接班以填補人力缺口。

highlight.en: Clipboard Health became a leader in long-term-care staffing, filling millions of shifts a year across the U.S. It crossed a $1.3B valuation after raising $80M, reaching roughly $314M in 2024 revenue.
highlight.zh: Clipboard Health 成為長照人力派遣的領導者,每年在全美填補數百萬個班次。完成 8,000 萬美元募資後估值突破 13 億美元,2024 年營收約 3.14 億美元。

funding.zh: 估值約 13 億美元;累計募資約 2.98 億美元

sources.title: Clipboard Health Notches $80M at $1.3B Valuation
Clipboard Health Business Breakdown & Founding Story

summary.en: AI-powered spend platform combining corporate cards, expense management, business accounts, and bill pay.
summary.zh: 結合企業卡、費用管理、商業帳戶與帳單支付的 AI 智慧支出平台。

highlight.en: Brex became a fintech unicorn within two years and peaked at a $12.3B valuation serving high-growth firms like DoorDash and Coinbase. Capital One agreed to acquire Brex in 2026 for $5.15B after it had raised over $2.3B.
highlight.zh: Brex 在兩年內成為金融科技獨角獸,巔峰估值達 123 億美元,客戶包括 DoorDash、Coinbase 等高成長企業。在累計募資逾 23 億美元後,Capital One 於 2026 年同意以 51.5 億美元收購。

funding.en: Peaked ~$12.3B valuation; raised >$2.3B; acquired by Capital One for $5.15B (2026)
funding.zh: 巔峰估值約 123 億美元;累計募資逾 23 億美元;2026 年被 Capital One 以 51.5 億美元收購

sources.title: Capital One To Buy Fintech Startup Brex At Less Than Half Its Peak Valuation In $5.15B Deal
Brex - Wikipedia

summary.en: Online wholesale marketplace using machine learning to connect independent retailers with brands worldwide.
summary.zh: 運用機器學習,將獨立零售商與全球品牌媒合的線上批發市集。

highlight.en: Faire built a global wholesale marketplace empowering local retail, becoming one of YC's standout B2B unicorns. It raised about $1.7B and was valued at $12.6B in 2022, later marked at $5.2B in a 2025 tender offer.
highlight.zh: Faire 打造賦能在地零售的全球批發市集,成為 YC 旗下亮眼的 B2B 獨角獸之一。累計募資約 17 億美元,2022 年估值達 126 億美元,2025 年股權收購中估值調整為 52 億美元。

funding.zh: 估值約 52 億美元(2025 年股權收購),巔峰 126 億美元;累計募資約 17 億美元

founders: Max Rhodes, Marcelo Cortes, Daniele Perito

sources.title: B2B marketplace Faire reaches $5.2 billion valuation
Faire Valuation Grows to $12.4 Billion With $400 Million Series G Funding Round

summary.en: Tech-enabled home-services platform in Latin America that directly employs its professional cleaners.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲的科技化居家服務平台,直接聘僱專業清潔人員以提升留任率與品質。

highlight.en: Hogaru provides professional cleaning and maintenance to homes and micro-businesses across Latin America. Unlike pure marketplaces, it employs cleaners directly to drive retention and service quality.
highlight.zh: Hogaru 為拉丁美洲的家庭與微型企業提供專業清潔與維護服務。有別於純媒合平台,它直接聘僱清潔人員,以提升留任率與服務品質。

summary.en: Nonprofit, nonpartisan organization defending the individual rights and liberties guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution.
summary.zh: 捍衛美國憲法所保障的個人權利與自由的非營利、無黨派組織。

highlight.en: A rare nonprofit to go through Y Combinator, the ACLU has grown since 1920 into an organization of more than 500,000 members. It handles nearly 6,000 court cases a year defending civil liberties nationwide.
highlight.zh: ACLU 是少數參與 Y Combinator 的非營利組織,自 1920 年成立以來已壯大至逾 50 萬名會員。每年處理近 6,000 件訴訟,在全美捍衛公民自由。

funding.en: Nonprofit funded by member dues, donations, and private grants (no government funding)
funding.zh: 由會員會費、捐款與私人補助資助的非營利組織(不接受政府資金)

sources.title: American Civil Liberties Union

summary.en: Mobile-first CMMS and enterprise asset-management software keeping maintenance technicians productive in the field.
summary.zh: 以行動裝置為先的 CMMS 與企業資產管理軟體,讓維護技師在現場保持高效。

highlight.en: UpKeep brought a mobile-first approach to legacy desktop maintenance software, surpassing 2M registered users. It raised about $49M total, including a $36M Series B led by Insight Partners.
highlight.zh: UpKeep 以行動優先思維革新傳統桌面維護軟體,註冊用戶突破 200 萬。累計募資約 4,900 萬美元,其中包含由 Insight Partners 領投的 3,600 萬美元 B 輪。

funding.en: Raised ~$49M total; $36M Series B led by Insight Partners (2020)
funding.zh: 累計募資約 4,900 萬美元;2020 年由 Insight Partners 領投 3,600 萬美元 B 輪

sources.title: UpKeep raises $36 million Series B to help facilities and maintenance teams go mobile
UpKeep - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding

summary.en: All-in-one payroll, HR, and health-benefits platform built specifically for Canadian small and mid-sized businesses.
summary.zh: 專為加拿大中小企業打造的薪資、HR 與健康福利一站式平台。

highlight.en: Humi built core employment infrastructure for Canada's economy, serving thousands of companies including Ada and Hubdoc. It was acquired by Australia's Employment Hero in January 2025 in a deal reported north of CAD 100M.
highlight.zh: Humi 為加拿大經濟打造核心的就業基礎設施,服務 Ada、Hubdoc 等數千家企業。2025 年 1 月被澳洲 Employment Hero 收購,交易金額據報逾 1 億加幣。

funding.en: Acquired by Employment Hero (Jan 2025), deal reported >CAD 100M
funding.zh: 2025 年 1 月被 Employment Hero 收購,交易金額據報逾 1 億加幣

sources.title: Humi Acquired by Employment Hero to Provide a Localized Solution for Canadian Businesses
Humi acquired by Australian HR software company Employment Hero

summary.en: Korean local-services marketplace connecting providers with customers across 1,000+ categories like moving and lessons.
summary.zh: 韓國在地服務媒合平台,涵蓋搬家、課程教學等 1,000 多種類別,連結服務提供者與顧客。

highlight.en: Soomgo (Korean for 'hidden master') became a leading services marketplace in South Korea spanning over 1,000 service types. It raised roughly $57M total and was acquired by PE firm Ark & Partners in October 2024.
highlight.zh: Soomgo(韓文意為「隱藏的高手」)成為韓國領先的服務媒合平台,涵蓋逾 1,000 種服務類型。累計募資約 5,700 萬美元,2024 年 10 月被私募股權公司 Ark & Partners 收購。

funding.en: Raised ~$57M total; acquired by Ark & Partners (Oct 2024)
funding.zh: 累計募資約 5,700 萬美元;2024 年 10 月被 Ark & Partners 收購

sources.title: Service marketplace Soomgo raises nearly $30 mn in Series C round
Ark & Partners tender offer for Soomgo
